creative_brief: Close-up of founder's face in dim lighting, looking thoughtful/concerned, with soft focus farm scene in background.
primary_text: Last Tuesday, I watched a farmer throw away perfectly good produce because supermarkets wouldn't pay a fair price. That night, I couldn't sleep. What if families could buy direct from farms like Rachel's Farm and Paris Creek? No warehouses, no middlemen. Just real food from named farms to your local hub.
headline: The night I couldn't sleep
description: Farm-direct groceries. Zero middlemen. We'll show you where your food comes from.
